categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App launched and main create/compose surface reachable, or app open on the list screen where new items of this type are created
abstract_steps: Navigate from launcher to the app's primary surface
Pass through onboarding/welcome if present
Confirm or accept default configuration if an initial configuration screen appears
Dismiss any transient informational dialogs
Locate the primary create affordance (e.g. record/start button, floating action button, or + icon)
Trigger the primary create action to begin creation or open a creation dialog/form
Fill required fields if a form is presented
Allow the creation process to run for the required duration if applicable
Trigger stop/finalize action if applicable
Confirm via the positive/confirmation control in any resulting finalize dialog
failure_modes: Clicking indices not present in the current UI listing
Mistaking a selector list for an editable text field
Ignoring or missing a blocking dialog
Terminating before the finalize step
Clicking the add control on the wrong tab/section
Confirming with empty or invalid name
Dismissing the dialog instead of confirming
verification_checklist: A new entry with non-zero size/duration appears in the list or main view
New item is visible in the corresponding list after dialog closes
Item name matches input exactly
Timer/status returns to idle state
No blocking dialog remains on screen
No error toast/dialog remained

categories.name: CREATE_ENTRY_WITH_CUSTOM_NAME
categories.precondition: App provides a means to assign a custom label, either at finalization time or via pre-set options
abstract_steps: Perform ADD_ENTRY up to the finalize step
When a finalize/name dialog appears, clear any pre-filled text
Type the desired custom name
Confirm finalization
failure_modes: Assuming a pre-creation name selector allows arbitrary text (it may only offer templates)
Trying to rename from a list view that lacks rename affordance
Getting stuck repeating the same invalid click instead of re-examining UI
Missing the finalize dialog because stop leads directly to an intermediate state
verification_checklist: Final entry appears with exactly the requested name
No duplicate entry with default name is left behind
Entry has expected size/duration

categories.name: DISMISS_INTERRUPTION
categories.precondition: A modal dialog or notice is blocking interaction
abstract_steps: Identify the affirmative/dismiss button (e.g. confirm, close)
Click it
Re-evaluate resulting screen before next action
failure_modes: Ignoring the dialog and clicking through it
Clicking a secondary/expand button when dismissal is intended
verification_checklist: Dialog is no longer visible
Underlying screen is interactive again

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: Device on launcher or another app
abstract_steps: Launch the target app via any available mechanism (launcher icon, app list, or open-by-name)
Pass any first-run welcome screen
Arrive at the main functional surface
failure_modes: App not installed
Stuck on onboarding if button not clicked
verification_checklist: App's primary UI elements visible
App title in header matches expected

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SECTION
categories.precondition: App open with tabbed or drawer navigation available
abstract_steps: Identify the section name relevant to the task (distinguishing between the different item-type sections available in the app)
Click the corresponding tab or drawer entry
Wait for the list content to load
failure_modes: Acting on the wrong tab's content
Assuming an item exists in a section it doesn't belong to
verification_checklist: Tab indicator reflects chosen section
Header/count matches expected section (e.g., 'N <ItemType>')

categories.name: RENAME_ENTRY
categories.precondition: An existing entry is present in a list
abstract_steps: Open the entry or its context menu (tap / long-press / overflow)
Locate a rename / edit-name option
Enter the desired label and confirm
failure_modes: App does not support relabeling from list view
Repeated taps produce no effect — agent must recognize and abandon
Confusing selection mode with edit mode
verification_checklist: Entry shows the updated label in list
No duplicate entries created

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Relevant list or detail view is reachable and not empty
abstract_steps: Navigate to the section containing the answer
Optionally apply a sort/filter to expose the required ordering
Read the requested field(s) directly from the UI
Return an answer action with the extracted value
failure_modes: Fabricating data when the target isn't in the library
Reading without ensuring correct sort direction
Confusing counts across different sections (mixing up item-type totals)
verification_checklist: Value is visible on-screen at time of answer
Sort/filter state matches the question's requirements
If item cannot be found after a bounded search, declare infeasible

categories.name: SEARCH_FOR_ITEM
categories.precondition: A search affordance is visible on a list screen
abstract_steps: Open the search interface
Type a concise query (a single attribute, not multiple attributes concatenated)
Inspect results; if none, try a broader/alternate term once
If still empty, conclude the item is absent
failure_modes: Appending new text to existing query (producing garbage like 'QueryQuery')
Retrying the same query repeatedly
Treating empty results as transient and looping
verification_checklist: Query field shows the intended text only
Either a result row appears or an explicit 'No results' message is shown
Bounded retry count respected before declaring infeasible

categories.name: SORT_LIST
categories.precondition: On a list screen that exposes a sort control
abstract_steps: Open the ordering configuration dialog via its icon
Select the desired attribute
Explicitly toggle the ordering direction to the required state
Dismiss dialog and verify order
failure_modes: Selecting only the attribute without setting direction
Using the wrong list's sort dialog (attributes differ across sections)
Declaring success without visually confirming the new order
verification_checklist: Dialog shows target attribute marked
Direction toggle reflects target direction
Top-most items in list match expected ordering

categories.name: OPEN_CONTAINER
abstract_steps: Tap the container row
Verify detail view loads
Check whether the container is empty before further actions
failure_modes: Attempting interaction on an empty container
Treating an empty-container message as a transient error
verification_checklist: Detail view title matches selected container
If empty, an explicit empty-state message is present; declare infeasible for content-dependent goals

categories.name: PLAY_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Target media item is visible in a list or detail view
abstract_steps: Locate the target row
Tap to start playback or use the row's play control
Confirm playback UI (now-playing bar / player screen) appears
failure_modes: Target not in local library (infeasible)
Tapping a container instead of a playable item
verification_checklist: Now-playing indicator reflects correct item identity
Playback controls (pause/seek) are operable
